meta.name: GF Fire Alarm Push Button
meta.description: GF fire alarm push button with optional camera
meta.heroTitle: Fire Alarm Push Button with Optional IP Camera
meta.heroDescription: UL-listed fire alarm push button with optional integrated IP camera for individual identification upon activation. Push-to-Activate and Key-to-Reset operation. Available with optional protective cover with or without sounder for vandalism and accidental activation prevention. Designed specifically for fire alarm system integration in regulated environments. To view the G3 Multipurpose Push Button, please click here.
